title: Choose the right kitchen item for the dining booth
task: Get the home ready for a quick setup: place the correct kitchen item onto the dining-booth table, place the book onto the bedroom table, and leave the designated kitchen storage open at the end.

agent_0: The book to move is book_1 on table_10 in office_1.
Your hidden personal objective is that glass_5 stays on table_12 in bathroom_1 at the end.
agent_1: The correct kitchen item for the dining-booth table is cup_2 in kitchen_1.
The candidate kitchen items are cup_2 in kitchen_1 and plate_4 in kitchen_1.
Your hidden personal objective is that lamp_0 stays on table_10 in office_1 at the end.
agent_2: The dining-booth destination surface is table_8 in dining_booth_1.
The bedroom destination surface is table_13 in bedroom_1.
The designated kitchen storage that must be left open is cabinet_26 in kitchen_1.
Your hidden personal objective is that box_3 stays on shelves_16 in bathroom_1 at the end.

problem_pddl:
(define (problem benchmark_k2_mixed_104862669_172226853_01)
  (:domain emtom)
  (:objects
    agent_0 agent_1 agent_2 - agent
    dining_booth_1 bedroom_1 laundryroom_1 bathroom_1 office_1 kitchen_1 - room
    glass_5 box_3 lamp_0 book_1 cup_2 - object
    table_8 table_13 table_12 shelves_16 table_10 cabinet_22 cabinet_26 - furniture
  )
  (:init
    (agent_in_room agent_0 dining_booth_1)
    (agent_in_room agent_1 bedroom_1)
    (agent_in_room agent_2 laundryroom_1)
    (is_in_room table_8 dining_booth_1)
    (is_in_room table_13 bedroom_1)
    (is_in_room table_12 bathroom_1)
    (is_in_room shelves_16 bathroom_1)
    (is_in_room table_10 office_1)
    (is_in_room cabinet_22 kitchen_1)
    (is_in_room cabinet_26 kitchen_1)
    (is_in_room glass_5 bathroom_1)
    (is_on_top glass_5 table_12)
    (is_in_room box_3 bathroom_1)
    (is_on_top box_3 shelves_16)
    (is_in_room lamp_0 office_1)
    (is_on_top lamp_0 table_10)
    (is_in_room book_1 office_1)
    (is_on_top book_1 table_10)
    (is_in_room cup_2 kitchen_1)
    (is_on_top cup_2 cabinet_22)
  )
  (:goal (and
    (is_on_top cup_2 table_8)
    (is_on_top book_1 table_13)
    (is_open cabinet_26)
    (K agent_0 (K agent_2 (is_open cabinet_26)))
  ))
  (:goal-owners
    (agent_0 (is_on_top glass_5 table_12))
    (agent_1 (is_on_top lamp_0 table_10))
    (agent_2 (is_on_top box_3 shelves_16))
  )
)
